---
name: Add a Roadmap
about: Suggest a new high-quality roadmap for the repository
title: '[ROADMAP] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## Roadmap Details

- **Name of Roadmap:** 
- **Official URL:** 
- **Category:** (e.g., Web Development, AI & Data)
- **Author/Organization:** 

## Metadata

- **Difficulty:** (🟢 Beginner, 🟡 Intermediate, 🟠 Advanced, 🔴 Expert)
- **Estimated Time:** (e.g., 3-5 Months)
- **Resource Type:** (🌐 Website, 📂 GitHub, 📄 PDF, 🎥 Video, 📚 Docs, 🎓 Course, 🛠 Interactive)
- **Last Updated Year:** (e.g., 2024)

## Justification

**Why should this be added?**
(Explain why this roadmap is high-quality, authoritative, and unique compared to what we already have.)

**Description:**
(Provide a 1-2 sentence description of the roadmap for the table.)

## Checklist

- [ ] This is from a trusted, authoritative source.
- [ ] This is not a duplicate of an existing roadmap (unless it offers a significantly different approach).
- [ ] I have read the Contribution Guidelines.
